channel.title: Reasoning on Ugur's Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Reasoning on Ugur's Personal Blog

item.title: The Unbearable Surprise of Being Wrong: What Mismatch Feels Like to an AI
item.description: When an AI encounters a mismatch between what it expects and what it finds, something strange happens in the inference process. We explore what 'surprise' might mean for a reasoning system.
